titleStmt.title: SII 28.108: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 108. (A.R. No. 263 of 1913.) ŚIṄGARATTŌPPU (NEAR CHIDAMBARAM), CHIDAMBARAM TALUK, SOUTH ARCOT DISTRICT.

p.hi: Tribhuvanachchakkaravartti Rājādhirāja alias Karikāla-chōḻa (Kulōttuṅga III) Year 2, 121st day.

summary.p: This inscription contains the original order of the king granting the concession in the paying viz the iṟai on land held in the name of several deities. God Mahādēva of Tirukkaḷāñjēri, hamlet of Perumbaṟṟappuliyūr (Chidambaram), Tiruttoṇḍa-ttogai-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār, Arumoḻī-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār, and Subramaṇya-ppiḷḷaiyār, whose shrine had been set in the premises of the temple of Arumoḻi-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār, the dēvadāna of Āḷuḍaiyār (the chief deity in the temple of Chidambaram) and land designated as brāhma[ṇa]-maḍappuṟam, either purchased for and on behalf of the deities or had been classified at the 8th grade and above at the rate as on 8th grade and on lands of grades lower than the 8th grade at the rate appropriate to the classified grade of land. The order also specified that the premises of the temple of Tiruttoṇḍattogai-Īśvaram-uḍaiyār, the residental streets around the temple and the land occupied by the sacred-tank would be exempt from assessment. The plea to this effect was made by Vaidumbarāyan (to the king). Villavarāyan was instructed to see to the execution of the order. No. 107 above which seems to be the same dated four days later than the present inscription seems to contain the details of the lands that were to benefit by this order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumukappaṭi . tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīrājātirāja
devarāṉa karikālacoḻadevaṟku yāṇṭu Iraṇṭu nāḷ nūṟṟirupattoṉ
ṟu villavarāyaṉ ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi perumpaṟṟap puliyūrt ti
rukkiḷāñceri mahādevarkkum tiruttoṇṭattokai Īśvaramuṭaiyārkkum A
rumoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiyārkkum Ikkoyilil Eḻuṉtaruḷi Irukkum subrama
ṇyayappiḷḷaiyārkkum Ivvūr nilattu Ikkoyilkaḷil tevarkaḷ tirunāmattil
vilaikoṇṭu Iṟuppāy varukiṟa nilaṅkaḷum Ivvūr mula paruṣaiyār
kaḷukku Iṟuppākiviṭṭa nilaṅkaḷum Āḷuṭaiyār tevatāṉattum
pirāmaṇa maṭappuṟameṉkiṟa nilattum tirukkiḷāñceri mātevar tiru
nāmattu parivattaṉai paṇṇiṉa nilamum Ittevarkaḷ tirunāma
ṅkaḷileyum Arumoḻi Īśvaramuṭaiyār koyil Eḻuntaru
ḷi Irukkum suppramaṇyaya piḷḷaiyār tirunāmattil koṇṭa nilam ArumoRead subrahmaṇya
ḻi Īśvarammuṭaiyār tirunāmattilley kūṭṭina Iṉṉilattu Eṭṭāṉ tara
ttukku melpaṭṭa taraṅkaḷ Eṭṭāṉ tarattate Iṟukkavum It tarattil
ḻi Iṟuttu varukiṟa nilaṅkaḷ muṉpu Iṟuttu varukiṟa taraṅkaḷile Iṟukkavum
tiruttoṇṭattokai Īśvaramuṭaiyār śrīkoyilum tirumuṟṟamum tirumaṭai
viḷākamum tirukkuḷamum Ākaviṭṭu varukiṟa nilam Iṟaikaṭṭukku Uṭalā
na paṭi tavira Ivvūr niṅkalukku Uṭalāka nikka kaṭavutākavum peṟaveṇume
nṟu vaitumparāyaṉ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ippaṭi ceyakkaṭavatākac co
llik kaṇakkilum Iṭṭukkoḷa kaṭavar kaṇakka vari kūṟu ceyvārkaḷukkum co
ṉṉom Ippaṭi ceyappaṇṇuvatu Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumantira lai [rājanārā]
muveṉtaveḷāṉ Ippaṭit tiruvāy moḻintaruḷiṉār Ivai nuḷampātarā
yaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vayirātarājaṉe(e)ḻuttu Ivai pañcavataraiyaṉ Eḻu
ttu Ivai Irājarāja muventaveḷān Eḻuttu Ivai maḻavarāyaṉṉe
(e)ḻuttu Ivai Aṉakarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai vaḷavarāyan Eḻuttu Ivai
vecālipperaiyan ṉeḻuttu Ivai Amarakoṉeḻuttu Ivai vi
caiyarāya ṉeḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.108 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
